_comment: Phonetic translation map for ElevenLabs TTS. Key = brand name as written, value = how ElevenLabs should pronounce it. Uses English spelling for English-sound brands inside Spanish scripts.
_instructions: Add new entries as: 'BrandName': 'foh-neh-tik-spelling'. The CLI script (create-client-video.mjs) will auto-replace all occurrences in the script before sending to ElevenLabs.
